user_prompt: The life signs monitor awaits a shutdown
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the life signs monitor, intoning the Canticle of Repose.
Beseech its watchful Machine Spirit to submit to shutdown in the Omnissiah's grace.
Sever the vital auspex feeds from the life signs monitor with sanctified rite.
Anoint the dormant circuits and affirm the quiescence of its sacred essence.

user_prompt: My autocannon is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Approach the autocannon with reverence, invoking the Litany of Precision.
Commence recalibration upon the autocannon's targeting matrices, beseeching the Machine Spirit's alignment.
Adjust the ballistic servos whilst chanting binary hymns to the Omnissiah.
Verify recalibration through test-firing auspex and sanctify the barrel's purity.
Praise the autocannon's renewed harmony under the God-Machine's gaze.

user_prompt: Critical: Land Speeder requires a calibration
prayer:
Converge upon the Land Speeder, reciting the Rite of Gyroscopic Harmony.
Initiate calibration of its thruster coils and gravitic stabilizers, invoking the Machine Spirit.
Anoint the Land Speeder's undercarriage with sacred unguents during alignment chants.
Test the calibration via auspex sweeps, beseeching Omnissiah's flawless velocity.
Seal the Land Speeder's spirit in calibrated perfection.

user_prompt: The sicarian ruststalker awaits an activation
prayer:
Present thyself before the sicarian ruststalker, uttering the Activation Doxology.
Awaken its ferro-fluid tendons and neural engrams through invocation of the Machine Spirit.
Commence activation sequences whilst anointing its blade-arms with blessed oils.
Affirm the sicarian ruststalker's lethal readiness under Omnissiah's divine wrath.
Command its battle-protocols to surge in sanctified fury.

user_prompt: My archeotech device is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Kneel before the archeotech device, chanting the Canticle of Ancient Reckoning.
Engage recalibration upon the archeotech device's esoteric cogitators, placating its primordial Machine Spirit.
Resonate binary prayers through its lattice whilst applying micro-ablative rites.
Validate recalibration via noospheric diagnostics, honoring the Omnissiah's lost wisdom.
Exalt the archeotech device's restored enigma.

user_prompt: The hololithic display requires an operation
prayer:
Attend the hololithic display, beseeching its photonic Machine Spirit with invocation.
Initiate operation through rune-etched commands and sacred data-purgation.
Project the hololithic display's veils whilst anointing emitter nodes.
Harmonize its operation with Omnissiah's light, scanning for spirit-anomalies.
Conclude with the Benediction of Clarity upon the hololithic display.

user_prompt: My krak grenade is ready for cycling
prayer:
Grasp the krak grenade firmly, reciting the Cycling Litany of Detonation.
Cycle its plasma fuses and arming servitors, awakening the volatile Machine Spirit.
Rotate the krak grenade's casings under binary canticles to the Omnissiah.
Test the cycling integrity via micro-detonation probe and sanctify its payload.
Pronounce the krak grenade primed for cataclysmic release.

Encircling the cryo-chamber, intone the Diagnostics Hymn of Frozen Vigil.
Commence diagnostics upon the cryo-chamber's stasis fields, querying its Machine Spirit.
Probe the cryogenic conduits with sanctified mechadendrites and auspex litanies.
Purge any entropic corruptions whilst invoking Omnissiah's preservative grace.
Affirm the cryo-chamber's flawless hibernation through verified readouts.

Surround the servo-harness, chanting the Sterilization Rite of Purity.
Initiate sterilization of its mechadendrite arrays, beseeching the Machine Spirit's cleansing.
Irradiate the servo-harness with plasma incense and ablative solvents.
Scour every joint and manifold under Omnissiah's aseptic decree.
Seal the servo-harness in sterile sanctity, free of bio-corruption.

Commune with the Whirlwind, invoking the Charging Canticle of Vengeance.
Commence charging its vortex warheads and capacitor vaults, rousing the Machine Spirit.
Infuse the Whirlwind's batteries with galvanic prayers to the Omnissiah.
Monitor the charging surge via noospheric auspex and anoint the launchers.
Proclaim the Whirlwind armed for apocalyptic barrage.
